title: Ores outlined (Bare Bones)
description: A Bare Bones addon to see more easily every ore in the game, as simple as that!
body:
A simple resource pack to add on top of Bare Bones to outline every ore in the game.

If you want you can still use it without Bare Bones, but your ore textures will be a bit different from the rest

[Showcased](https://youtu.be/zTeWlyN4T-s?t=109) on ThrillHouse 2.0's channel!

<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/zTeWlyN4T-s" title="Top Minecraft Resource Packs Of All Time (1.20.4 - 1.16)" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>">
